blended.narrative: Lost Trail is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 8.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 56".
